CHAPTER TWO: SETTING THE TARGET
PAGE 02
1
By day, Aditya runs the family shop.
I can't sit in class all day.
2
A campus degree meant leaving it all.
Who minds the shop if I go?
3
Then he found an online BBA.
Learn AND mind the shop!
4
Now he studies once the shutters close.
Both. At once.

Why Online BBA Just Works

  • 1
    Study 100% online, anytime, from your phone or laptop. No campus, no commute.
  • 2
    The same UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ BBA as on-campus, recognised everywhere.
  • 3
    Just ₹45,000/year with 0% interest EMI, or 15% off on upfront payment.
  • 4
    Weekend live classes plus recordings, so learning fits around your work.
